# Lechner Studios

> Design-led, AI-native digital studio in Wattens, Tirol (Austria), serving
> small and medium businesses across the DACH region. Four service pillars:
> Web & Design, Apps & Automation, SEO & Growth, Brand & Identity.

Founded and run by Sonja Lechner. Bilingual site: German (Sie-Form) at /de,
English at /en. Prices are final (Kleinunternehmer, no VAT charged).

Web & Design has its own storefront at https://werk.lechner-studios.at — that
is where packages, fixed prices and the per-trade offerings live.

## Services

- [Web & Design — Werk storefront](https://werk.lechner-studios.at): handbuilt websites at fixed prices. Präsenz entry from € 1.500; per-trade packages in three tiers. Machine-readable prices: https://werk.lechner-studios.at/pricing.md
- [Apps & Automation](https://lechner-studios.at/en/apps-automation): Next.js + Supabase web apps, workflow automation (n8n / Make / Zapier), Claude / OpenAI integrations.
- [SEO & Growth](https://lechner-studios.at/en/seo): technical search optimisation, structured data, performance.
- [Brand & Identity](https://lechner-studios.at/en/brand): brand systems, identity, design language.

## About

- [About / the studio](https://lechner-studios.at/en/about): who runs it and how it works.
- [Work](https://lechner-studios.at/en/work): selected builds and concepts.
- [Contact](https://lechner-studios.at/en/contact)

## Writing

- [Blog](https://lechner-studios.at/en/blog): technical and practical writing on websites, automation, local search and brand, aimed at business owners rather than developers.

## Optional

- [Impressum](https://lechner-studios.at/de/impressum)
- [Privacy / Datenschutz](https://lechner-studios.at/de/privacy)

## Notes

- Explicitly out of scope: native mobile apps, enterprise-scale platforms,
  anything requiring a delivery team, page-builder or template websites.
- The on-site assistant is "The Studio Director", an openly-disclosed AI twin of
  the founder. It does not agree terms, quote bespoke prices, or give legal or
  tax advice.
- Contact: hallo@lechner-studios.at
